title: aristida coerulescens var. pumila
intro: Aristida coerulescens var. pumila, also known as dwarf blue grama grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Aristida coerulescens var. pumila include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
